title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 23 2021
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 23 2021
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 23 2021
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 23/08/2021
Iron ore physical port stock prices remained flat when DCE iron ore futures market continued vulnerable tendency. Traders performed to be firmthan last week and some refused to offer further concessions on the prices. Some mills conducted on- demands procurements and total transactions remained insipid.
